zh.lifeSummary: Gfst. Isajaw Mstislawitsch Von Kiew是Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev和Kristina Ingesdotter的兒子，於1101年出生。他於大約1131年與Agnes von Hohenstaufen在烏克蘭Київ結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1154年2月13日在Российская империяКиевская губерния享年53歲，埋葬在蘇聯烏克蘭Київська областьКиїв。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gfst. Isajaw Mstislawitsch Von Kiew是Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev和Kristina Ingesdotter的儿子，于1101年出生。他于大约1131年与Agnes von Hohenstaufen在乌克兰Київ结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1154年2月13日在Российская империяКиевская губерния享年53岁，埋葬在苏联乌克兰Київська областьКиїв。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kiew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Austrian German: occupational name for a cowherd, Chüyger in the Tyrolean dialect, from Kühe ‘cows’ (plural of Kuh) + -er suffix of agent nouns.
Scottish (Ayrshire and Lanarkshire): variant of   Keir  .

variants.name: Kear
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): occupational name for a locksmith, from Middle English keyer, kayer ‘key-maker, locksmith’ (Old English cǣgere, a derivative of cǣg ‘key’).

nameMeanings.name: Gfst.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived in one of the areas of ‘geest’ (sandy soil) in northwestern Germany.
habitational name from any of several places so named in the Lower Rhine area.

en.lifeSummary: Gfst. Isajaw Mstislawitsch Von Kiew was born in 1101 as the son of Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev and Kristina Ingesdotter. He married Agnes von Hohenstaufen about 1131, in Kyiv, Ukraine. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 February 1154, in Kiev, Russian Empire, at the age of 53, and was buried in Kyiv, Kyiv, Ukraine, Soviet Union.

fr.lifeSummary: Gfst. Isajaw Mstislawitsch Von Kiew est né en 1101, fils de Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev et Kristina Ingesdotter. Il a épousé Agnes von Hohenstaufen environ 1131, à Kyiv, Ukraine. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 février 1154, à Kiev, Empire russe, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ukraine, Union soviétique.

de.lifeSummary: Gfst. Isajaw Mstislawitsch Von Kiew wurde 1101, als Sohn von Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev und Kristina Ingesdotter geboren. Er hat um 1131 in Kyiv, Ukraine Agnes von Hohenstaufen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Februar 1154 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich und wurde in Kiew, Kyiv, Ukraine, Sowjetunion begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Gfst. Isajaw Mstislawitsch Von Kiew è nato il nel 1101 come figlio di Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev e Kristina Ingesdotter. Lui sposato Agnes von Hohenstaufen circa 1131, nel Kyiv, Ucraina. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 febbraio 1154, nel Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ucraina, Sowjetunion.

ja.lifeSummary: Gfst. Isajaw Mstislawitsch Von Kiewは1101年にMstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of KievとKristina Ingesdotterの息子として生まれた。約1131年にウクライナКиївでAgnes von Hohenstaufenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1154年2月13日にРоссийская империяКиевская губернияで53歳で死去し，ソビエト連邦ウクライナКиївська областьКиївにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gfst. Isajaw Mstislawitsch Von Kiew(은)는 1101년 Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev(와)과 Kristina Ingesdotter의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1131년 우크라이나 Київ에서 Agnes von Hohenstaufen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1154년 2월 13일 Российская империя Киевская губерния에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 소련 우크라이나 Київська область Київ에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gfst. Isajaw Mstislawitsch Von Kiew nasceu em 1101 filho de Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev e Kristina Ingesdotter. Ele casou-se com Agnes von Hohenstaufen aproximadamente 1131, em Kyiv, Ucrânia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1154, em Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ucrânia, Sowjetunion.

ru.of,Smolensk,Smolensk,Russia: Смоленск, Смоленский район, Смоленская Область, Россия
ru.lifeSummary: Gfst. Isajaw Mstislawitsch Von Kiew родился в 1101 г. Его родителей звали Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev и Kristina Ingesdotter. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes von Hohenstaufen около 1131 г. в местности Киев, Украина. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 февраля 1154 г. в местности Киевская губерния, Российская империя в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности Киев, Киевская область, Украина, Советский Союз.

es.lifeSummary: Gfst. Isajaw Mstislawitsch Von Kiew nació en 1101 como hijo de Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev y Kristina Ingesdotter. Se casó con Agnes von Hohenstaufen aproximadamente 1131, en Kyiv, Ucrania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de febrero de 1154, en Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ucrania, Unión Soviética.
